summary: Testing of End of Service feature for POS Caisse Pro. All 12 features verified: Server can submit daily report with observation, Manager receives notification with badge and can view/mark reports as read. Backend API tests: 8/8 passed. Frontend UI tests: All flows verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: ✅ Serveur voit le bouton 'Terminer Service' dans le header - Visible with purple/indigo gradient styling
✅ Clic sur 'Terminer Service' ouvre le modal - Modal opens with title 'Terminer Mon Service'
✅ Modal affiche le résumé de la journée (commandes, validées, total) - Stats section shows Commandes, Validées, Total
✅ Champ 'Observation' est présent et fonctionnel - Textarea present with placeholder
✅ Bouton 'Envoyer le Point' soumet le rapport - Button works and triggers API call
✅ Toast de confirmation s'affiche après envoi - Toast: 'Votre point journalier a été envoyé à la gérante !'
✅ Gérante voit l'icône notification avec badge - ClipboardList icon with badge count (e.g., '2')
✅ Clic ouvre le panneau 'Points des Serveurs' - Panel opens with title 'Points des Serveurs'
✅ Panneau affiche le rapport avec: nom serveur, stats, observation - All fields displayed correctly
✅ Marquer comme lu fonctionne - Click on report marks it as read + 'Tout marquer lu' button works
✅ API POST /api/server-end-of-service fonctionne - 8/8 pytest tests passed
✅ API GET /api/server-end-of-service-reports fonctionne - Reports returned with stats and observation
critical_code_review_comments: Code implementation is complete and functional
API endpoints properly calculate server stats from invoices collection
Report model includes: server_name, total_invoices, validated_invoices, pending_invoices, total_sales, observation, is_read
Frontend correctly displays badge count and toggles panel visibility
seed_data_creation: Created end-of-service reports via API tests and UI testing (observation: 'Test observation: Journée calme, pas de problème particulier')
context_for_next_testing_agent: End of Service feature is fully functional. Server (Marie Dupont, PIN 1234) can click 'Terminer Service' button in header to open modal, add observation, and submit. Manager (Mères AHOUANDJINOU, PIN 0000) sees notification icon with badge count, clicking opens 'Points des Serveurs' panel showing all server reports with stats and observations. Backend APIs: POST /api/server-end-of-service, GET /api/server-end-of-service-reports, PUT /api/server-end-of-service-reports/{id}/read, PUT /api/server-end-of-service-reports/mark-all-read

features_verified.server_terminer_service_button: Working - Purple/indigo gradient button in header, visible only for server role
features_verified.server_modal: Working - Opens 'Terminer Mon Service' modal with summary stats and observation textarea
features_verified.server_submit: Working - 'Envoyer le Point' button submits report, shows success toast
features_verified.manager_notification_icon: Working - ClipboardList icon with badge showing unread count
features_verified.manager_panel: Working - 'Points des Serveurs' panel opens with list of reports
features_verified.report_content: Working - Each report shows server name, stats (Commandes, Validées, Total), observation, timestamp
features_verified.mark_as_read: Working - Click on report marks it as read, 'Tout marquer lu' button marks all as read
features_verified.api_create_report: Working - POST /api/server-end-of-service creates report with calculated stats
features_verified.api_get_reports: Working - GET /api/server-end-of-service-reports returns reports with unread_count

api_endpoints_tested: POST /api/server-end-of-service - Create end of service report
PUT /api/server-end-of-service-reports/{report_id}/read - Mark single report as read
PUT /api/server-end-of-service-reports/mark-all-read - Mark all reports as read
note: Marie Dupont (Server) has 0 invoices for today as noted by main agent, so stats show 0. The observation test text was: 'Test observation: Journée calme, pas de problème particulier'
